new_value: Fixed: all coap_server handlers (status_get, config_*, neighbors_get, key_get, msg_inbox_*) now call lichen_coap_respond/send_ack and return 0/negative errno only (no positive COAP codes). Updated coap_dtn.c, coap_msg.c, coap_config.c, coap_keys.c, coap_location.c resource defines to lichen_coap_server for consistency. Logging standardized to LOG_ERR. Full coap_*.c + tests fixed.
